hero.title: Sky @ Night
hero.subtitle: Rooftop Experience
hero.description: Enjoy your evenings at Sky Cafe with rooftop dining, live music, candle light dinners, sports screenings, buffet nights, and private celebrations.

services.title: Rooftop Dining
services.description: Open-air rooftop dining with a relaxed atmosphere and city views. Perfect for evenings with friends.

services.title: Live Music
services.description: Hosted on selected evenings. Follow our updates for upcoming performances.

services.title: Candle Light Dinner
services.description: Premium setup for special occasions, anniversaries, and date nights. Prior booking required.

services.title: Sports Screening
services.description: Watch live major sports events on our big screen with food & drinks.

services.title: Buffet Nights
services.description: Organized on selected weekends. Menu and pricing announced in advance.

services.title: Birthday Celebrations
services.description: Celebrate with custom decorations and music. Note: External cake cutting charges: ₹500.

services.title: Corporate Events
services.description: Plan your team outings, corporate dinners, and business celebrations on our rooftop.

services.title: Private Party Bookings
services.description: Perfect for engagement parties, anniversaries, and large get-togethers.

areas.title: Open Rooftop (Shelter-less)
areas.description: 4 exclusive tables with stunning city landscape views.

areas.title: Main Rooftop Section
areas.description: 10+ tables in a vibrant open-air atmosphere.
